# StopwatchPro

> StopwatchPro is a free, browser-based online stopwatch and lap timer with millisecond accuracy. No download or sign-up required.

StopwatchPro runs entirely in the browser and works on desktop, tablet, and mobile. It supports unlimited lap recording with automatic best/worst split highlighting, and continues working offline after the first page load.

## Key Features
- Millisecond-accurate stopwatch timing
- Unlimited lap recording with best/worst split highlighting
- Keyboard shortcuts: Space (Start/Stop), L (Lap), R (Reset)
- No installation, account, or sign-up needed
- Works offline after first load

## Common Use Cases
- Workout and run tracking
- Cooking timers
- Study sessions (Pomodoro technique)
- Science experiments
- Sports coaching and interval training
